ddls:
CREATE TABLE "inventory_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item available */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the item */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school where the item is located */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location within the school */,
  "incharge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the person in charge of the item */,
  "state" TEXT /* Current status of the item (e.g., In use, Under repair) */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the item was purchased */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the item */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the item */,
  "warranty_expiration" TEXT /* Warranty expiration date */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Last maintenance date */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Next scheduled maintenance date */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks about the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_items_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_items_incharge_id FOREIGN KEY ("incharge_id") REFERENCES incharges ("incharge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_items_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_items_state FOREIGN KEY ("state") REFERENCES item_states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Furniture and fittings, Stationery Items) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the category includes */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category for hierarchical categorization */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the school */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the school */,
  "principal_name" TEXT /* Name of the school principal */,
  "principal_contact" TEXT /* Contact information of the principal */,
  "total_students" INTEGER /* Total number of students in the school */,
  "total_teachers" INTEGER /* Total number of teachers in the school */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incharges" (
  "incharge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each person in charge */,
  "incharge_name" TEXT /* Full name of the incharge */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the incharge */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or role of the incharge */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the incharge */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the incharge is currently active */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the incharge joined the school */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incharge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state (e.g., In use, Under repair) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the state */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the state is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchase_history" (
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase record */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item that was purchased */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of purchase */,
  "supplier" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount spent on the purchase */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Invoice number for the purchase */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Date the item was delivered */,
  "is_paid" INTEGER /* Indicates if the payment has been made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_history_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES inventory_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role in the inventory system (e.g., admin, teacher) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each request record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the request */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item requested */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date of the request */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the request (e.g., pending, approved) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item requested */,
  "justification" TEXT /* Justification for the request */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the request */,
  "approved_date" TEXT /* Date the request was approved */,
  "is_fulfilled" INTEGER /* Indicates if the request has been fulfilled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_requests_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
